name: Ledger Orchestrator
summary: Atomically register a plan + N features + surfaces + plan_features + bootstrap change-log in a single seed migration. Mirrors red-e-play's 0157 / 0159 / 0164…
description: Atomically register a plan + N features + surfaces + plan_features + bootstrap change-log in a single seed migration. Mirrors red-e-play's 0157 / 0159 / 0164 canonical pattern. Idempotent. Includes is_public=TRUE flip, ON CONFLICT guards, and the bootstrap feature_changes notes.
author: marvelousempire
